voisin1.name: Marie
voisin1.quote: I stop in for my lotto ticket and walk out with a cold beer for dinner. It's become a ritual.

voisin2.name: Jean-Philippe
voisin2.quote: Sunday nights, Nobert's is what saves our Monday lunch boxes. Always open, always smiling.

voisin3.name: Lise
voisin3.quote: Nobert knows my first name and my habits. That's rare and that's precious.

socialProof.consentNote: Testimonials published with written consent, in accordance with Quebec's Law 25.

storyBrand.title: You, the neighbourhood, and a store that knows you
storyBrand.paragraphHero: The neighbourhood is you. You have your habits, your small pleasures, your rhythm — a coffee before work, a beer on Friday, a hopeful lotto ticket on Sunday.
storyBrand.paragraphGuide: Nobert has been running the store since {anneeFondation}. He knows the names, the habits, the good news. He orders the craft beer you love and keeps the bread fresh for those who drop in late in the day.
storyBrand.paragraphPromise: No chain, no loyalty cards, no slogans. Just a store open for you, steps away, with the smile and personal service that go with it.
storyBrand.imageAlt: Nobert Tremblay, owner, behind the counter of his store in {city}

newsletter.eyebrow: Not spam, just the good deals

newsletter.subtitle: This week's promotions, one short email, every Friday morning. Unsubscribe in one click anytime.

faq.title: Your questions about promotions
faq.subtitle: Three common questions from the neighbourhood.

duree.question: How long do the promotions last?
duree.answer: Each promotion is valid for one week, from Friday to the following Thursday. Some run longer — the end date is always shown on the card.

retrait.question: Can I reserve a promotional item?
retrait.answer: Yes, call us at {telephone}. We'll set the item aside for the day. No deposit required for the regular neighbourhood.

livraison.question: Do you offer delivery?
livraison.answer: Not at the moment. Dépanneur Nobert stays a neighbourhood shop — we count on your in-store visits to keep the connection.

crossSell.title: Want the full catalog?
crossSell.subtitle: Beyond the promotions, find everything you need on our shelves.

hero.title: Everything you need, every day

bieres.title: Local craft beer and major brands
bieres.subtitle: Quebec craft breweries and well-chilled classics. Selection refreshed by season.
bieres.note: Alcohol sales are regulated by SAQ. Permit posted in store. Sales to minors are prohibited.

snacks.title: Cold snacks, hot snacks
snacks.subtitle: Late-night munchies, evening treats, chips, chocolate — the right pick for any break.

lotto.title: Loto-Québec tickets and scratch cards
lotto.subtitle: All Loto-Québec tickets, scratch cards and validations. Draws posted at the counter.

essentiels.title: Daily essentials
essentiels.subtitle: Bread, milk, coffee, paper, takeaway coffee — the things you forget on the way home.
essentiels.note: Selection adjusted by season and neighbourhood needs. A special request? Just ask Nobert.

faq.title: Your questions about our products
faq.subtitle: The most common questions from the neighbourhood.

commandeSpeciale.question: Do you take special orders?
commandeSpeciale.answer: Often, yes. Ask Nobert in store or call {telephone} — he'll tell you in two minutes if the order is possible.

commandeTelephone.question: Do you take phone orders?
commandeTelephone.answer: Yes, for the neighbourhood regulars. Call {telephone}, we'll prepare the order and you can pick it up when convenient.

permisBiere.question: Do you have a permit to sell beer?
permisBiere.answer: Yes, the SAQ permit is posted in store. Alcohol sales to minors are prohibited under Quebec law.

crossSell.title: Active promotions this week
crossSell.subtitle: Take advantage of the deals before the flyer ends.

rpp.title: Your rights, your peace of mind
rpp.body: Your personal information is protected under Quebec's Law 25. You may consult, correct or request the deletion of your data by writing to the privacy officer:
rpp.incidentNote: In the event of a privacy incident, write to {rppEmail}: we follow a notification process compliant with art. 3.5 of Law 25.

meta.title: Privacy Policy (Law 25) — Dépanneur Nobert
meta.description: Privacy policy of Dépanneur Nobert compliant with Quebec's Law 25: data collected, purposes, retention, rights, privacy officer.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Dépanneur Nobert inc. (hereinafter "we," "our" or "Dépanneur Nobert") considers the protection of your personal information fundamental. This policy explains, in plain language, what data we collect, why, how long we keep it, who it is shared with, and how to exercise your rights under Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Law 25).
privacy.rppBody: In accordance with article 3.1 of Law 25, Dépanneur Nobert has appointed a privacy officer. For any question about this policy, your data, or the exercise of your rights, please contact:
privacy.dataIntro: We only collect information necessary for the purposes described below:

newsletter.label: Newsletter signup
newsletter.purpose: To send you the weekly promotions flyer.
newsletter.retention: 12 months after your last interaction (click, open).

contact.label: Contact form
contact.fields: Name, email address, phone (optional), message content.
contact.purpose: To handle your request and reply to it.

phoneOrder.label: Phone orders
phoneOrder.fields: First name, phone number, order content.
phoneOrder.purpose: To prepare your order and follow up if needed.

analytics.label: Audience measurement (with consent)
analytics.fields: Truncated IP address, pages viewed, device type, source.
analytics.purpose: To understand site traffic and improve it.

cookiesEssentials.label: Essential cookies
cookiesEssentials.purpose: To run the site (language, cookie choices).
cookiesEssentials.retention: Session or 12 months depending on the cookie (details in the banner).

privacy.purposesBody: Your information is processed for specific, legitimate purposes limited to what is necessary. No personal information is used for automated profiling, resale, or third-party marketing sharing.
privacy.consentBody: Your consent is explicit, free, informed and revocable at any time. For non-essential cookies (analytics, interactive map), you give your agreement via the consent banner, which offers Accept, Decline or Customize with strict visual parity. No box is pre-checked.
privacy.thirdPartiesIntro: We rely on service providers to run the website. These subprocessors are bound by contract to confidentiality and data security:

vercel.name: Vercel Inc.
vercel.purpose: To serve the site's pages with performance and security.

googleAnalytics.name: Google LLC (Analytics)
googleAnalytics.purpose: Traffic statistics (truncated IP, pseudonymization, mandatory opt-in).

googleMaps.name: Google LLC (Maps)
googleMaps.purpose: To display the neighbourhood map on the Contact page, after consent.

resend.name: Resend Inc.
resend.purpose: To send the flyer and form confirmations.

privacy.transferBody: Some information may be transferred to the United States (Vercel, Google, Resend). We ensure these transfers carry appropriate contractual safeguards (standard clauses, encryption in transit and at rest). You are informed of these transfers before any non-essential processing.
privacy.rightsIntro: Law 25 grants you several rights you can exercise at any time by writing to the privacy officer:

rightsItems.access: Right of access: obtain the list of your information held by us.
rightsItems.rectification: Right of rectification: correct inaccurate data.
rightsItems.deletion: Right of deletion: request the erasure of your data.
rightsItems.portability: Right to portability: receive your data in a machine-readable format.
rightsItems.withdraw: Right to withdraw consent: at any time, for non-essential processing.
rightsItems.complaint: Right to file a complaint with the Quebec Access to Information Commission (cai.gouv.qc.ca).
rightsItems.deindex: Right to de-indexing: request the cessation of the diffusion of personal information.

privacy.rightsResponseTime: We answer any request within a maximum of 30 days, in accordance with Law 25.
privacy.incidentBody: In the event of a privacy incident posing a serious risk of harm, Dépanneur Nobert applies a notification procedure in accordance with article 3.5 of Law 25: register, risk assessment, notification to the Access to Information Commission and to the persons concerned as soon as possible. To report an incident, write to {rppEmail}.
privacy.securityBody: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures: TLS encryption on all pages, security headers (HSTS, CSP), restricted data access, forms protected against spam, regular software dependency updates.
privacy.minorsBody: The site is not intended for children under 14. No voluntary collection takes place from minors. If a parent or guardian notices an involuntary collection, they can write to {rppEmail} for immediate deletion.
privacy.updatesBody: This policy may be updated to reflect legal or operational changes. The last update date is shown at the top of the page. In case of major changes, a visible notification will be posted on the site for 30 days.
privacy.contactBody: For any question about your data, contact the privacy officer at {rppEmail}, or by postal mail at: Dépanneur Nobert inc. — Privacy Officer, {adresseLigne}, {ville} (Quebec) {codePostal}, Canada.

meta.title: Legal Notice — Dépanneur Nobert
meta.description: Legal notice of Dépanneur Nobert: company name, NEQ, address, contact, hosting provider. Company legal information.

notice.title: Legal Notice
notice.intro: This legal notice informs visitors and users of the depanneur-nobert.ca website about the publisher's identity, the hosting provider, and the conditions of use of the website.
notice.editorBody: The depanneur-nobert.ca website is published by:
notice.hostingBody: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Avenue #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States. Service data flows between Canada and the United States. For more information about transfers outside Quebec, please consult our privacy policy.
notice.ipBody: All website content (texts, photographs, logo, trademarks, layouts) is the property of Dépanneur Nobert inc. or its partners, and is protected by copyright and trademark law. Any reproduction, distribution or use without prior written consent is prohibited.
notice.linksBody: The site may contain links to third-party websites. Dépanneur Nobert inc. has no control over the content of these sites and disclaims all responsibility regarding their use. Browsing third-party sites is solely under the user's responsibility.
notice.liabilityBody: Dépanneur Nobert inc. makes every effort to ensure the accuracy and timeliness of the information published. However, no guarantee is given regarding the absence of errors or the uninterrupted availability of the site. The publisher's liability cannot be engaged for any direct or indirect damage resulting from the use of the site.
notice.applicableLawBody: This notice is subject to Quebec law and applicable Canadian law. Any dispute relating to the website will be brought before the competent courts of the judicial district of Quebec.
notice.alcoholNoticeBody: Alcohol sales are regulated by Quebec's Régie des alcools, des courses et des jeux. The sales permit is posted in store. Sales to minors are strictly prohibited.
notice.contactBody: For any question about this notice or the site, write to {email} or call {telephone}.
